Name: FMovieSceneEvaluationTrack
Description:
Evaluation track that is stored within an evaluation template for a sequence.
  Contains user-defined evaluation templates, and an optional track implementation

Variables.Name: ObjectBindingID
Variables.Description: ID of the possessable or spawnable within the UMovieScene this track belongs to, if any. Zero guid where this relates to a master track.

Variables.Name: EvaluationPriority
Variables.Description: Evaluation priority. Highest is evaluated first

Variables.Name: Segments
Variables.Description: Array of segmented ranges contained within the track.

Variables.Name: EvaluationGroup
Variables.Description: Flush group that determines whether this track belongs to a group of tracks

Variables.Name: bEvaluateInPreroll
Variables.Description: Whether this track is evaluated in preroll

Variables.Name: bEvaluateInPostroll
Variables.Description: Whether this track is evaluated in postroll
